name: Prevail Legal Software (VA & SSA) API
what_it_does: Prevail Legal Software case management REST API for VA disability claims, Social Security disability (SSDI/SSI), and worker's compensation attorneys specializing in disability and benefit claims. Enables AI agents to manage VA disability claim and appeal case management for veterans disability law firm automation, handle Social Security disability hearing preparation and appeal tracking for SSDI case management automation, access claimant medical record request and tracking for disability documentation automation, retrieve hearing date and ALJ assignment management for disability hearing preparation, manage fee agreement and attorney fee tracking for disability fee application automation, handle correspondence generation and claimant communication for disability claim communication automation, access case stage workflow for VA rating decision, BVA, CAVC appeal management for veterans law automation, retrieve staff productivity and caseload analytics for disability law firm operations, manage electronic filing integration with VA and SSA for e-filing automation, and integrate Prevail with medical records retrieval, e-signature, and document management for disability law firm operations.
use_cases: Managing VA disability claims from veterans law agents
Tracking SSDI hearings from disability law agents
Requesting medical records from documentation agents
Preparing ALJ hearings from disability hearing agents
best_when: A veterans disability (VA) law firm, Social Security disability firm, or workers compensation attorney wanting AI agents to automate claim tracking, hearing preparation, medical records management, and claimant communication within Prevail as the specialized disability case management platform.
avoid_when: VA RATING DECISION INTERPRETATION ATTORNEY RESPONSIBILITY: Automated VA rating decision analysis must not substitute for attorney legal interpretation of rating decisions; automated routing of rating decisions without attorney review creates risk of missed rating errors, overlooked special monthly compensation, or incorrect appeal deadline calculation. SSDI HEARING PREPARATION CLAIMANT CREDIBILITY ASSESSMENT: Automated Social Security disability hearing preparation must include attorney assessment of claimant testimony credibility and medical record consistency; automated hearing prep without attorney claimant interview and credibility assessment creates under-prepared ALJ hearing presentation. SSA APPOINTED REPRESENTATIVE FEE AGREEMENT ACCURACY: Automated fee agreement generation in Prevail for Social Security disability representation must comply with SSA fee agreement cap (25% of past-due benefits up to $7,200 as of 2024); automated fee calculation above SSA cap creates unauthorized fee collection and SSA sanctions.

auth.notes: Prevail Legal Software uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Orlando, Florida HQ. Founded 1997. Private. Specializes in VA disability, SSDI/SSI, and workers compensation disability claims. 3,000+ disability law firm and accredited representative users. VA and SSA electronic filing integration. Medical records request workflow. Competes with RomWeb, Case Management by Houdini, and eVetRecs for disability law case management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-user subscription; VA, SSDI, and WC modules; e-filing add-ons
pricing.notes: Orlando FL. Private. Founded 1997. 3,000+ disability law users. VA/SSDI/WC focus. Annual per-user subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; case and document queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS AND API KEY ONLY — POLLING REQUIRED: Prevail does not support webhooks; all case status, hearing date, and claimant event detection requires scheduled polling; design polling intervals aligned with disability law firm daily case management cycles

VA APPEAL DEADLINE PRECISION FOR NOTICE OF DISAGREEMENT: Automated VA appeal deadline tracking in Prevail must apply accurate appeal deadlines (Notice of Disagreement: 1 year from rating decision; BVA appeal: 60 days from Statement of the Case; CAVC: 120 days from BVA decision); automated deadline calculation errors for multi-stage VA appeals creates missed appeal rights and potential malpractice

SSA FEE AGREEMENT CAP COMPLIANCE: Automated SSDI/SSI fee agreement generation must cap attorney fee at current SSA maximum (25% of past-due benefits up to SSA-published cap, adjusted annually); automated fee agreement using outdated cap creates SSA sanctions and fee forfeiture; update SSA fee cap in automation configuration annually

VA VBMS electronic file integration dependency — Prevail VA disability workflows integrate with VA Veterans Benefits Management System (VBMS) for e-filing; automated VA claim submission requires current VA VBMS API credentials and accreditation; VA accreditation for representatives must be current; expired VA accreditation creates electronic filing rejection

Claimant medical record HIPAA authorization currency — automated medical record requests in Prevail for disability claimants must use current HIPAA authorization; medical provider requirements for disability authorization wording differ from treatment authorization; automated requests using standard HIPAA authorization without disability-specific language creates record provider rejection

VA rating decision effective date calculation complexity — automated VA rating decision processing must correctly calculate effective date for disability compensation (generally earliest of: date of claim or date the disability arose, whichever is later); effective date determines retroactive benefits amount; automated effective date calculation errors create incorrect retroactive benefit calculation and missed effective date arguments
agent_readiness.security_notes: Disability law case management. SOC2. API key. US. Veteran and SSA claimant sensitive data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Disability law. SOC2. API key. US. Veteran/claimant sensitive legal and medical data.
